fields.name: Pawn Shop Owner
fields.description: Runs cash through a legal front and only talks business when asked.

fields.name: Carla the Fence
fields.description: Moves hot goods fast and prefers quiet side conversations.

fields.name: Mickey Two-Fingers
fields.description: Card-room regular who notices who can handle pressure.

fields.name: Court Clerk
fields.description: Keeps one foot in public records and one in the rumor mill.

fields.name: Dock Foreman
fields.description: Knows what comes off-manifest and who can be trusted with it.
